name: player_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays range year_offset pools cpoe
description: CPOE is a per-dropback mean; a range year_offset pools SUM(cpoe)/SUM(qualifying dropbacks), not SUM of per-season averages.
expected_query: with "t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f" as materialized (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, SUM(cpoe) as pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_numerator, SUM(CASE WHEN cpoe IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by COALESCE(psr_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f WHERE t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.pid = player.pid) AS "pass_comp_pct_over_expected_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
